title: jatropha pohliana var. divergens
intro: Jatropha pohliana var. divergens, also known as Jatropha divergens, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as treating various skin conditions, including eczema and dermatitis, and it is also used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Jatropha divergens is typically used to create infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, which are applied directly to the affected area to harness its therapeutic properties.
